Allows smoking, steaming and keeping food at serving temperature. The set includes a tank for steaming or smoking food, a double-sided steamer and 2 warming trays. The reservoir turns the grill into a full-fledged smoker. By adding Weber smoking chips, you will be able to prepare smoked dishes such as ribs, pork shoulders and more.
